metadata.description: Subagents that integrate MeticaSDK into Unity projects in one pass — including projects that already use AppLovin MAX — plus a runtime ad-log monitor for verifying integrations on device.

plugins.name: metica-sdk-agents
plugins.description: Four Claude Code subagents (compat-checker, integrator, validator, ad-log-monitor) for MeticaSDK Unity integration and runtime verification.
